title: Risk Register Input
description: Required and optional inputs for executing the Risk Register skill.

problem_statement.description: The business problem or diagnostic question to be analyzed.

company_context.description: Company background, industry, size, and relevant business context.

defined_risk_assessment.description: Defined risk assessment scope (organization-wide, business unit, program, or project level) with explicit inclusion and exclusion boundaries

stakeholder_interviews_facilitated.description: Stakeholder interviews, facilitated risk workshops, and historical incident and loss data to support risk identification

risk_categorization_taxonomy.description: A risk categorization taxonomy (strategic, operational, financial, compliance, reputational, or equivalent client-specific categories)

likelihood_impact_scoring.description: A likelihood and impact scoring scale with defined descriptors for each level (1–5 recommended)

benchmarking_data.description: Industry risk benchmarking data or sector-specific risk library to supplement internal identification and ensure completeness

existing_audit_findings.description: Existing audit findings, board papers, and prior risk assessments to incorporate previously identified risks and their historical treatment
